summary.en: A macro-environment scanning framework that maps six categories of external forces — political, economic, social, technological, environmental, and legal — so teams see which long-running shifts shape the industry before drafting business-model moves.
summary.zh: 一套宏观环境扫描框架，把外部力量分成政治、经济、社会、技术、环境和法律 6 类，让团队在动手改商业模式之前先看清哪些长周期变化在塑造行业。

sources.label: Francis J. Aguilar · Scanning the Business Environment · Macmillan · 1967

references.label: Francis J. Aguilar · Scanning the Business Environment · Macmillan

note.en: Original source for ETPS — economic, technological, political, social — the seed of PEST/PESTEL macro environment scanning.
note.zh: ETPS（经济、技术、政治、社会）的原始来源，也是 PEST/PESTEL 宏观环境扫描的源头。

note.en: Concise contemporary explanation of the six-letter extension (PESTEL/PESTLE) and how to apply it as a scanning routine.
note.zh: 现行 6 字母扩展（PESTEL/PESTLE）的简明说明，以及作为扫描例程如何使用。
